prompts.label: sports bra fit
prompts.query: how to choose the right sports bra support level for different workouts
prompts.claudeResponse: For yoga and pilates choose light-medium support (Freya Active), for HIIT choose high support (Panache Sport), and for running choose maximum support (Shock Absorber). Consider cup size, band adjustment options, and try multiple sizes as different brands fit differently.
